conditions: Image is a valid underwater snapshot. Closest/right piling is visible with decent structure. The 11 ft and 14 ft pilings are present but very hazy silhouettes with little to no texture. Farthest (30 ft) pilings are essentially not discernible beyond vague vertical shading. This matches conditions where the 14 ft piling is a hazy silhouette but still visible.

Closest 4 ft piling on right is very sharp with clear texture. The 11 ft piling is visible but hazy, and the 14 ft/30 ft pilings are only vague vertical bands with no clear structure, similar to or slightly better than the 25 ft reference silhouettes but without bottom visible. This corresponds best to the guideline where the 14 ft piling is hazy/faded.

The closest 4ft piling at right is sharp with good texture. The mid/right piling and a farther central piling are visible but both appear as soft silhouettes with little detail. This matches conditions where the 14ft+ pilings are hazy/faded rather than crisp, indicating around 15 ft visibility.

Closest 4 ft piling on right is very sharp with clear texture. The mid/right ~11 ft piling is also visible with some detail. The 14 ft piling on left is only faintly hinted at as a darker band and lacks clear structure, and the 30 ft pilings are not discernible. This corresponds to conditions where only the 11 ft piling is reliably visible beyond the closest, so visibility is about 10 ft.

Closest 4ft piling on right is sharp with clear texture. The 11ft piling is visible but somewhat hazy. The 14ft/back-left piling region is present only as a very faint dark mass with little to no detail, more of a silhouette than a sharp structure. No clear view of 30ft pilings or bottom. This matches conditions where the 14ft piling is hazy/faded, corresponding to about 15 ft visibility.

Closest 4ft piling at right is sharp with clear texture. The 11ft piling behind it is visible but soft. The 14ft/30ft pilings toward the center are only broad hazy silhouettes with no texture, and the bottom is not visible. This corresponds best to the 15 ft guideline where the 14ft region is a faded silhouette.

Closest 4 ft piling at right edge is clear with some texture; mid-right (~11 ft) piling appears as a broad dark band but with very little detail and quickly fades. No distinct view of 14 ft or 30 ft pilings and bottom not visible. This corresponds to only the 11 ft piling being discernible beyond the nearest, so visibility is about 10 ft.
